# Support Guidelines

Thank you for using Vencore! If you need help, please use the following resources:

## 1. Documentation
Before asking a question, check our official documentation:
* **Documentation Portal**: https://vencore.in/docs
* **Plugin SDK Guides**: https://vencore.in/docs/sdk
* **Vencore Bot configuration**: Read [vencore-bot README](https://github.com/vencorehq/vencore-bot#readme)

## 2. Interactive Support
Join our official communication channels to chat with core maintainers and the community:
* **Discord Community**: [Join the Vencore Discord Server](https://discord.gg/vencore)
* **GitHub Discussions**: Visit the [Discussions tab](https://github.com/vencorehq/Vencore/discussions) on the Vencore core repository.

## 3. Commercial Support
For custom white-label deployments, plugin development requests, or SLA support, contact our enterprise division:
* **Email**: contact@vencore.in
* **Website**: https://vencore.in
